text.title: Spatial Accessibility in XR Interfaces Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the experience recalibrate UI position from user height at session start?

branch.question: Is the standing-only locomotion accompanied by a seated alternate?

text.example: Concrete walk: Workshop VR module: panels recalibrate at session start, seated mode toggle in pause menu, critical events emit directional audio → approve.
